site.title: Ƙungiyar Kasuwanci ta Ƙasashen Duniya
site.tagline: Daga buƙatar samun dama ga jama'a repo
nav.label: Na farko
meta.home.description: IATF tana juya ainihin buƙatun samun dama zuwa wuraren ajiyar buɗe tushen jama'a.
meta.projects.description: Bincika ayyukan samun damar jama'a da aka buga ta hanyar IATF.
meta.propose.description: Nemi aikin samun dama daga IATF ta hanyar yanar gizo, imel, ko Discord.
meta.governance.description: Karanta yadda IATF ke karɓar ayyukan, gudanar da wuraren ajiya, da kuma kiyaye aikin jama'a.
meta.join.description: Hanyoyi don shiga cikin IATF: ba da lambar, fassara, gwaji, ko kula da aikin.
meta.accessibility.description: Ta yaya IATF ke da burin ci gaba da samun damar wannan rukunin yanar gizon da kuma yadda za a ba da rahoton wani shinge na samun dama.
meta.transparency.description: Bayanan jama'a na IATF: yanke shawara, ayyukan, da sabuntawa suna buɗewa ta tsohuwa.
actions.emailProjects: Aika ayyukan imel zuwa akwatin saƙo mai shigowa
registry.empty.title: Babu ayyukan da aka buga har yanzu
registry.empty.body: IATF tana shirya saitin aikinta na farko na jama'a.
proposal.form.title: Aika da buƙata
proposal.form.body: Cika fom ɗin da ke ƙasa don aika buƙata zuwa IATF.
proposal.form.noscript: Ana buƙatar JavaScript don amfani da wannan fom ɗin yanar gizo. Idan ba a samu ba, yi amfani da imel ko Discord a maimakon haka.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Live ƙaddamarwa ba a saita a cikin wannan yanayi. Wannan tsari zai bude your email abokin ciniki maimakon.
proposal.form.ready: A lokacin da ka aika da bukatar, IATF zai haifar da wani intake rikodin.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Da fatan za a kammala binciken kariya na spam kafin aikawa.
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Kariya daga wasikun banza ya ƙare. Da fatan za a sake duba kafin aikawa.
proposal.form.turnstileError: An kasa tabbatar da kariya daga wasikun banza a yanzu. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Kariya daga wasikun banza ta ƙare. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Da fatan za a cika filayen da ake buƙata kafin aikawa.
proposal.form.success: Godiya. An karɓi buƙatarku kuma an adana don dubawa.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Idan ka sake tuntuɓar IATF game da wannan buƙatar, haɗa da bayanin da ke ƙasa.
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Wani abu ya faru ba daidai ba yayin aika buƙatar. Da fatan a sake gwadawa. Idan matsalar ta ci gaba, yi amfani da imel maimakon.
proposal.subjectUntitled: Buƙatar da ba ta da suna
project.detail.problemTitle: Wace matsala wannan aikin ya warware
project.detail.whyTitle: Dalilin da ya sa wannan aikin ya wanzu
project.detail.scopeOutTitle: Ba a yi amfani da shi ba
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Tushen Turanci na yau da kullun, ana iya ƙara fassarar daga baya
footer.label: Ƙasan shafin
footer.howToContribute: Yadda za a ba da gudummawa
footer.licenseContent: Abubuwan da ke ciki CC BY-SA 4.0
footer.blurb: Aikin samun dama ya kamata ya zama da sauki a fara, ya zama mai sauki a buga, kuma ya fi sauki a ci gaba da budewa.
footer.source: Ƙididdigar daidaitattun daidaito: [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Ayyukan da masu amfani da fasahar taimakawa suka sanar.
contact.label: Saduwa
translation.label: Yanayin fassara
translation.source: Turanci shine asalin asalin harshe don wannan shafin.
translation.humanReviewed: Wani mai magana mai kyau ya sake duba wannan fassarar.
translation.machineAssisted: Wannan fassara ne na'ura-taimaka da kuma ya ba tukuna da aka cikakken sake nazari da wani m magana. Shawarwari suna maraba ta hanyar GitHub.
translation.needsUpdate: An sake nazarin wannan fassarar kafin sabunta tushen Ingilishi na baya-bayan nan kuma yana iya buƙatar gyara.
translation.report: Yi rahoton matsalar fassara: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Ka yi haƙuri .
